notes: HAR-234 runtime evidence for local fulfillment-order lifecycle staging. The fixture captures Shopify 2026-04 partial hold/release, partial move, report-progress/open, cancel/replacement behavior, representative unknown-id validation, and guardrails for reschedule/close/reroute. The generic parity runner cannot yet replay this multi-operation order-scoped flow directly, so the referenced integration test enforces local staging, downstream read behavior, meta log visibility, and no upstream passthrough.
